[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized illustration shows a side-profile character with spiky orange hair and a headpiece in front of a mechanical or vehicle-like background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a person drawn in anime-style art, shown in side profile facing right, with spiky orange hair, a pale green and white face covering or neck guard across the front of the jaw area, and a light teal headband-like piece wrapping around the head with a central emblem. The person wears a dark green high-collared jacket with a teal inner lining and visible stitching and folds, and they have a serious, focused expression with one eye partially visible.

Setting:
The background appears to be a mechanical interior or machine panel scene, with white and gray structural elements, curved surfaces, and rows of panel details. Multiple small circular features and linework suggest instrument panels or control areas, presented in a clean, graphic, illustrated style. The lighting appears even and bright with high contrast suited to a digital illustration.

Visual Details:
The character’s hair is orange with sharp, spiky strands and strong outlines. The head covering is mostly white and pale green, with a light teal emblem resembling a stylized fleur-de-lis-like symbol in the center. The jacket collar is high and rounded, with teal fabric visible under the collar and a dark green outer layer. The mechanical background is drawn in white, gray, and black, with panel divisions and small icons or knobs implied by linework. The camera angle is close-up and profile-focused, with the character occupying most of the right side of the image.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
This image is an illustrated close-up of a spiky orange-haired character in side profile wearing a dark green jacket and a pale green-and-white head covering. Behind the character is a clean, graphic mechanical or control-panel background with panel lines and small circular details.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
